english: Salutations to Shambhu the beneficent and to the source of happiness
roman: Namah Shambhavaya cha Mayo bhavaya cha

english: Salutations to Shankara the auspicious and to the maker of joy
Salutations to Shiva and to the supremely auspicious one
roman: Namah Shivaya cha Shivata raya cha

english: I praise the supreme state which is of the nature of Brahma, Vishnu and Shiva
roman: Brahma Vishnu Shivatmakam staumi param padam

english: The lord of the trinity, the supreme ruler, the cause of all causes
roman: Trimurti Isham Pareshanam sarva karana karanam

english: Salutations to the all-powerful, to the god of gods
Whoever reads this Parameshwara Stuti daily with proper procedure
roman: Parameshvara stutim idam yah pathet nityam vidhanatah

english: Certainly attains the knowledge of Brahman by the grace of the Trinity
roman: Trimurteh prasadad Brahma gyanam apnoti nishchitam
